nodes.name: Webhook: Receive Document
nodes.notes: Entry point — receives file uploads from external systems or manual triggers

nodes.name: DocFlow API: Process Document
nodes.notes: Calls DocFlow AI pipeline: OCR → LLM → semantic match → confidence score

nodes.name: Download CSV Export
nodes.notes: Auto-approved path — download the structured CSV

nodes.name: Slack: Auto-Approved Alert
nodes.notes: Replace YOUR_SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL with your Slack incoming webhook

nodes.name: Schedule: Poll Review Queue
nodes.notes: Every 5 min — check for stuck items in review queue
